# Task
Name: prompt/extra-files
Title: Extra files prompt task
Branch: prompt/extra-files
Directory: .subtask/tasks/prompt--extra-files (PLAN.md, PROGRESS.json)

## Workspace
Your working directory is `/tmp/ws`. This IS your copy of the project — a git worktree of `main` on branch `prompt/extra-files`.

- Use paths relative to cwd, or absolute paths under cwd.
- Never use absolute paths to other clones of this project (e.g. `/Users/.../Code/<projectname>`). Edits outside your worktree will not appear on your task branch and will not merge.
- If unsure, run `pwd` and `git rev-parse --show-toplevel` — both should match cwd.

## Description
Use the extra files in the task folder.

--------------------

Follow PLAN.md and update PROGRESS.json.
